title: xanthophyllum cochinchinense
intro: Xanthophyllum cochinchinense, also known as the Vietnamese horse chestnut, is a plant species that belongs to the family Polygalaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been shown to have various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Xanthophyllum cochinchinense are often used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, with potential benefits including pain relief, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
